violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket made with soap and sanitizer.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop laying with handle in ice.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Refrigerator found with ambient temps of 58. *Moved hot dog to freezer until refrigerator maintains 41f or less.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Did not locate thermometer in prep table or refrigerator.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Test strips for Quat sanitizer not available in unit.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
